# Repository Instructions

This repository uses scoped instruction files for framework-specific guidance.

## Angular Guidance Source

1. For Angular component, template, and style work, follow the rules in `.github/instructions/angular-app.instructions.md`.
2. That scoped file owns the Angular MCP sequence, component standards, and validation expectations.

## Bootstrap Guidance Source

1. For Bootstrap layout and style work, follow the rules in `.github/instructions/bootstrap-ui.instructions.md`.
2. Use Bootstrap utilities and responsive patterns first, keeping custom CSS minimal and scoped.

## General Expectations

1. Keep edits minimal and focused on the user request.
2. Run available checks when changing behavior.
3. Call out residual risks when checks cannot be run.
